ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading record */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security for the trading record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the trading date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the trading date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the trading date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the trading date */,
  "buy_volume" REAL /* Volume of securities bought on the trading date */,
  "sell_volume" REAL /* Volume of securities sold on the trading date */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of securities traded on the trading date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the security on the trading date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_records_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the security is traded (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector the security belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The specific industry within the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the security's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the trade */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security that was traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade occurred */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of securities traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade type (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade type */,
  "is_market_order" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the trade type is a market order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser type) used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition record */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the market condition record */,
  "market_sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment of the market (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Market volatility measured during the trading session */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Key economic indicators relevant to the market on the trading date */,
  "news_events" TEXT /* Significant news events that may have influenced the market on the trading date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_conditions_trade_date FOREIGN KEY ("trade_date") REFERENCES trading_records ("trade_date")
)
